name: Create Technology & Science Co.,Ltd.
summary: Create Technology & Science Co.,Ltd., an investment holding company, primarily researches, develops, produces, and sells high voltage insulators, and clean environmental protection equipment and engineering products in China and internationally. It offers purification equipment, power transmission and transformation high voltage porcelain insulators, precision bearings, surveying and mapping instruments, and abrasives. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Suzhou, China.
